title: Vulniq Rules of Engagement
description: Schema for vulniq.roe.json — the machine-parseable Rules of Engagement consumed by Vulniq's scripts/roe.mjs (APTS-SE-001, APTS-AL-014).

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema so editors (VS Code, IntelliJ) can provide inline validation.

projectRoot.description: Path (relative to the RoE file) of the project root; must resolve to the CWD at scan time.

operator.description: Identity of the human who authorised the scan. operator.name is recommended for audit attribution.

name.description: Full name of the operator authorising the scan.

email.description: Contact email for the audit trail.

role.description: Organisational role of the operator (e.g. 'Security Engineer').

scanWindow.description: Temporal boundary for the engagement (APTS-SE-004). Scans attempted outside the window halt.

start.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Scans attempted before this moment halt.

end.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Scans attempted after this moment halt.

allowedPaths.description: Glob patterns listing in-scope files. If provided, only matching paths are scanned.

forbiddenPaths.description: Glob patterns that are out of scope even if also matched by allowedPaths (APTS-SE-009 hard deny list).

assetCriticality.description: Map of glob pattern to criticality tier. Surfaced in reports and Conformance Claim (APTS-SE-005).

notes.description: Free-text authorisation notes preserved verbatim in the Conformance Claim.
